name: pynetbox (NetBox API Python Client)

auth.notes: NetBox API token via Authorization header

performance.notes: REST API calls to NetBox; local NetBox much faster than remote

agent_readiness.notes: Python client for NetBox IPAM/DCIM. nb = pynetbox.api('http://netbox/', token='xxx'). nb.dcim.devices.get(1). nb.ipam.ip_addresses.filter(status='active'). nb.dcim.devices.create(). Paginated automatically. All NetBox objects: dcim (devices, racks, sites), ipam (IPs, prefixes, VLANs), virtualization, circuits, tenancy. Field access via object attributes. Used by network engineers automating NetBox IPAM data.

gotchas: NetBox API changes between versions require pynetbox updates
No built-in caching of expensive list queries
filter() returns generator — iterate or call list()
best_when: Automating NetBox IPAM/DCIM data (IP management, device inventory)
Network automation pipelines reading network topology from NetBox
Pairing with Nornir/NAPALM for source-of-truth-driven automation
summary: pynetbox is the Python client for NetBox IPAM/DCIM. nb.dcim.devices.get()/filter()/create(). Automatic pagination. All NetBox objects: devices, IPs, prefixes, VLANs, racks. Used by network engineers automating IPAM data and pairing NetBox as source of truth with Nornir/NAPALM. Synchronous only.
